parameters.query:
WITH clean AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') AS input_phone
)
SELECT p.id as profile_id, p.user_id, p.display_name, p.phone, p.is_premium, p.has_completed_onboarding,
  (SELECT notification_preferences FROM user_progress WHERE user_id = p.user_id LIMIT 1) AS notification_preferences
FROM profiles p, clean c
WHERE
  -- Match exato
  regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = c.input_phone
  -- Sem codigo do pais no DB
  OR regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = '55' || c.input_phone
  -- Sem codigo do pais no input
  OR '55' || regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = c.input_phone
  -- Ultimos 11 digitos
  OR RIGHT(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 11) = RIGHT(c.input_phone, 11)
  -- Ultimos 10 digitos
  OR RIGHT(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 10) = RIGHT(c.input_phone, 10)
  -- NOVO: Nono digito - ultimos 8 digitos (num local) + DDD igual
  OR (
    RIGHT(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 8) = RIGHT(c.input_phone, 8)
    AND CASE
      WHEN LENGTH(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) >= 12
        THEN SUBSTRING(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 3, 2)
      WHEN LENGTH(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) >= 10
        THEN SUBSTRING(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 1, 2)
      ELSE '00'
    END = CASE
      WHEN LENGTH(c.input_phone) >= 12
        THEN SUBSTRING(c.input_phone, 3, 2)
      WHEN LENGTH(c.input_phone) >= 10
        THEN SUBSTRING(c.input_phone, 1, 2)
      ELSE '00'
    END
  )
LIMIT 1;

WITH deactivated AS (
  UPDATE habits SET is_active = false, updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE user_id = $1::uuid AND is_active = true
    AND frequency_type = 'once' AND due_date < CURRENT_DATE
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT h.id, h.name, h.emoji, h.category, h.period, h.streak, h.is_active,
  h.frequency_type, h.due_date, h.reminder_time,
  CASE WHEN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM habit_completions hc
    WHERE hc.habit_id = h.id AND hc.completed_at = CURRENT_DATE
  ) THEN true ELSE false END as completed_today
FROM habits h
WHERE h.user_id = $1::uuid AND h.is_active = true
  AND h.id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM deactivated)
ORDER BY CASE h.period
  WHEN 'morning' THEN 1 WHEN 'afternoon' THEN 2 WHEN 'evening' THEN 3 END;

INSERT INTO habit_completions (habit_id, user_id, completed_at, created_at)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date, NOW())
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
UPDATE habits
SET streak = CASE
  WHEN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM habit_completions
    WHERE habit_id = $1::uuid AND completed_at = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date - INTERVAL '1 day'
  ) THEN streak + 1
  ELSE 1
END,
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1::uuid;
SELECT * FROM habits WHERE id = $1::uuid;

INSERT INTO habits (
  user_id, name, emoji, category, period,
  streak, is_active, days_of_week, frequency_type,
  reminder_time, due_date, created_at, updated_at, type
)
SELECT
  $1::uuid,
  $2::text,
  COALESCE(NULLIF($8, ''), ''),
  COALESCE(NULLIF($9, ''), 'productivity'),
  $3::text,
  0,
  true,
  $4::smallint[],
  $5::habit_frequency_type,
  $6::time,
  $7::date,
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  CASE WHEN $5 = 'once' THEN 'reminder' ELSE 'habit' END
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM habits
  WHERE user_id = $1::uuid
    AND LOWER(TRIM(name)) = LOWER(TRIM($2::text))
    AND is_active = true
    AND (frequency_type != 'once' OR (frequency_type = 'once' AND due_date = $7::date))
)
ON CONFLICT (user_id, LOWER(TRIM(name))) WHERE is_active = true DO NOTHING
RETURNING *;

UPDATE habits SET
  name = COALESCE(NULLIF($2, ''), name),
  period = COALESCE(NULLIF($3, ''), period),
  reminder_time = CASE WHEN $4 = '' THEN reminder_time ELSE $4::time END,
  days_of_week = CASE WHEN $5 = '{}' THEN days_of_week ELSE $5::smallint[] END,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1::uuid AND is_active = true
RETURNING *;

UPDATE habits
SET is_active = false, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING *;

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all();

parameters.query:
WITH matched_user AS (
  SELECT p.user_id, regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') AS profile_phone
  FROM profiles p
  WHERE regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') != ''
    AND (
      regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
      OR RIGHT(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 11) = RIGHT(regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 11)
      OR RIGHT(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 10) = RIGHT(regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 10)
      OR (
        RIGHT(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 8) = RIGHT(regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 8)
        AND CASE
          WHEN LENGTH(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) >= 12
            THEN SUBSTRING(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 3, 2)
          WHEN LENGTH(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) >= 10
            THEN SUBSTRING(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 1, 2)
          ELSE '00'
        END = CASE
          WHEN LENGTH(regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) >= 12
            THEN SUBSTRING(regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 3, 2)
          WHEN LENGTH(regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) >= 10
            THEN SUBSTRING(regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 1, 2)
          ELSE '00'
        END
      )
    )
  LIMIT 1
),
canonical_phone AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    (SELECT profile_phone FROM matched_user),
    regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
  ) AS phone
),
normalize_existing AS (
  UPDATE whatsapp_conversations
  SET phone = (SELECT phone FROM canonical_phone),
      updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM matched_user)
    AND phone != (SELECT phone FROM canonical_phone)
    AND (SELECT user_id FROM matched_user) IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM whatsapp_conversations
      WHERE phone = (SELECT phone FROM canonical_phone)
    )
  RETURNING *
)
INSERT INTO public.whatsapp_conversations (phone, user_id, messages, pending_action, pending_data, awaiting_input)
VALUES (
  (SELECT phone FROM canonical_phone),
  (SELECT user_id FROM matched_user),
  '[]'::jsonb, NULL, '{}'::jsonb, NULL
)
ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET
  last_interaction = NOW(),
  user_id = COALESCE(whatsapp_conversations.user_id, (SELECT user_id FROM matched_user))
RETURNING *;

SELECT
  t.id, t.name, t.slug, t.icon_key, t.color,
  t.default_unit, t.default_goal_value, t.default_frequency_type,
  c.name as category_name, c.icon_key as category_icon
FROM public.habit_templates t
LEFT JOIN public.habit_categories c ON t.category_id = c.id
ORDER BY c.sort_order, t.name
LIMIT 20;

UPDATE public.whatsapp_conversations
SET
  messages = (
    WITH newest_20 AS (
      SELECT elem, (elem->>'timestamp')::timestamptz as ts
      FROM (
        SELECT elem, (elem->>'timestamp')::timestamptz as ts
        FROM jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(messages, '[]'::jsonb)) elem
        WHERE elem IS NOT NULL AND elem->>'role' IS NOT NULL AND elem->>'content' IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT $2::jsonb, ($2::jsonb->>'timestamp')::timestamptz
        UNION ALL
        SELECT $3::jsonb, ($3::jsonb->>'timestamp')::timestamptz
      ) all_msgs
      WHERE elem IS NOT NULL
      ORDER BY ts DESC
      LIMIT 20
    )
    SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(elem ORDER BY ts ASC), '[]'::jsonb)
    FROM newest_20
  ),
  pending_action = $4,
  pending_data = $5::jsonb,
  awaiting_input = $6,
  last_interaction = NOW(),
  last_user_message = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE phone = $1
RETURNING *;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [($('Format DB Parameters').first().json.db_phone || $('Format DB Parameters').first().json.phone), $('Format DB Parameters').first().json.user_message, $('Format DB Parameters').first().json.assistant_message, $('Format DB Parameters').first().json.pending_action, $('Format DB Parameters').first().json.pending_data, $('Format DB Parameters').first().json.awaiting_input] }}

parameters.query:
WITH habit_effective_times AS (
  SELECT
    h.id AS habit_id, h.user_id, h.name, h.emoji, h.category,
    h.period, h.streak, h.days_of_week, h.times_per_day,
    h.frequency_type, h.due_date,
    COALESCE(
      h.reminder_time,
      (SELECT hn.time FROM habit_notifications hn WHERE hn.habit_id = h.id LIMIT 1),
      CASE h.period
        WHEN 'morning' THEN '07:00'::time
        WHEN 'afternoon' THEN '13:00'::time
        WHEN 'evening' THEN '19:00'::time
      END
    ) AS effective_time,
    p.phone, p.display_name, p.is_premium, p.created_at AS user_created_at,
    h.source
  FROM habits h
  JOIN profiles p ON p.user_id = h.user_id
  WHERE h.is_active = true
    AND p.phone IS NOT NULL AND p.phone != ''
    AND (h.notification_pref IS NULL
         OR (h.notification_pref->>'reminder_enabled')::boolean IS DISTINCT FROM false)

)
SELECT het.*
FROM habit_effective_times het
WHERE (CASE WHEN het.frequency_type = 'once' THEN het.effective_time
      ELSE het.effective_time - (
    SELECT COALESCE((upo.notification_preferences->>'reminder_offset_minutes')::integer, 10)
    FROM user_progress upo WHERE upo.user_id = het.user_id LIMIT 1
  ) * INTERVAL '1 minute' END)::time >= $1::time
  AND (CASE WHEN het.frequency_type = 'once' THEN het.effective_time
      ELSE het.effective_time - (
    SELECT COALESCE((upo.notification_preferences->>'reminder_offset_minutes')::integer, 10)
    FROM user_progress upo WHERE upo.user_id = het.user_id LIMIT 1
  ) * INTERVAL '1 minute' END)::time <= $2::time
  AND (
    (het.frequency_type IS DISTINCT FROM 'once'
     AND (het.days_of_week IS NULL OR array_length(het.days_of_week,1) IS NULL
          OR $3::int = ANY(het.days_of_week)))
    OR
    (het.frequency_type = 'once' AND het.due_date = $4::date)
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM habit_completions hc
    WHERE hc.habit_id = het.habit_id AND hc.completed_at = $4::date
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM notification_history nh
    WHERE nh.habit_id = het.habit_id AND nh.user_id = het.user_id
      AND nh.notification_date = $4::date AND nh.context_type LIKE 'whatsapp_%'
  )


  -- Per-user cooldown: skip se usuario recebeu lembrete WhatsApp nos ultimos 60 min
  -- Previne spam quando habitos tem horarios proximos mas em janelas diferentes


  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM whatsapp_conversations wc_opt
    WHERE wc_opt.user_id = het.user_id AND wc_opt.opted_out = true
  )
ORDER BY het.user_id;

SELECT p.user_id, p.phone, p.display_name,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification_history nh
   WHERE nh.user_id = p.user_id AND nh.context_type = 'whatsapp_reengagement'
  )::int + 1 AS reengagement_tier
FROM profiles p
WHERE p.phone IS NOT NULL AND p.phone != ''
  AND p.created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM habits h WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id AND h.is_active = true)
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM habit_completions hc
    WHERE hc.user_id = p.user_id
      AND hc.completed_at >= ($1::date - INTERVAL '7 days')
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM user_progress up
    WHERE up.user_id = p.user_id
      AND up.last_activity_date >= ($1::date - INTERVAL '7 days')
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM notification_history nh
    WHERE nh.user_id = p.user_id
      AND nh.context_type = 'whatsapp_reengagement'
      AND nh.sent_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  )
  AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification_history nh
       WHERE nh.user_id = p.user_id AND nh.context_type = 'whatsapp_reengagement'
  ) < 3
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM whatsapp_conversations wc_opt
    WHERE wc_opt.user_id = p.user_id AND wc_opt.opted_out = true
  )

SELECT
  p.user_id, p.phone, p.display_name,
  json_agg(json_build_object(
    'name', h.name, 'emoji', h.emoji, 'period', h.period,
    'reminder_time', COALESCE(h.reminder_time,
      CASE h.period WHEN 'morning' THEN '07:00'::time WHEN 'afternoon' THEN '13:00'::time ELSE '19:00'::time END)
  ) ORDER BY COALESCE(h.reminder_time,
      CASE h.period WHEN 'morning' THEN '07:00'::time WHEN 'afternoon' THEN '13:00'::time ELSE '19:00'::time END)) AS habits_today,
  COUNT(h.id)::int AS habit_count
FROM profiles p
JOIN habits h ON h.user_id = p.user_id
WHERE p.phone IS NOT NULL AND p.phone != ''
  AND h.is_active = true
  AND (
    h.frequency_type = 'daily'
    OR (h.frequency_type NOT IN ('daily', 'once')
        AND h.days_of_week @> ARRAY[EXTRACT(DOW FROM (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'))::smallint])
    OR (h.frequency_type = 'once' AND h.due_date = $1::date)
  )
  AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') = 7
  AND EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') < 5
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM notification_history nh
    WHERE nh.user_id = p.user_id
      AND nh.context_type = 'whatsapp_morning_summary'
      AND nh.notification_date = $1::date
  )

  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM whatsapp_conversations wc_opt
    WHERE wc_opt.user_id = p.user_id AND wc_opt.opted_out = true
  )
GROUP BY p.user_id, p.phone, p.display_name

SELECT
  p.user_id, p.phone, p.display_name,
  json_agg(json_build_object(
    'name', h.name, 'emoji', h.emoji,
    'completed', (hc.id IS NOT NULL)
  ) ORDER BY COALESCE(h.reminder_time, '09:00'::time)) AS habits_today,
  COUNT(h.id)::int AS total_habits,
  COUNT(hc.id)::int AS completed_count
FROM profiles p
JOIN habits h ON h.user_id = p.user_id
LEFT JOIN habit_completions hc
  ON hc.habit_id = h.id AND hc.completed_at::date = $1::date
WHERE p.phone IS NOT NULL AND p.phone != ''
  AND h.is_active = true
  AND (
    h.frequency_type = 'daily'
    OR (h.frequency_type NOT IN ('daily', 'once')
        AND h.days_of_week @> ARRAY[EXTRACT(DOW FROM (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'))::smallint])
    OR (h.frequency_type = 'once' AND h.due_date = $1::date)
  )
  AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') = 21
  AND EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') < 5
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM notification_history nh
    WHERE nh.user_id = p.user_id
      AND nh.context_type = 'whatsapp_evening_recap'
      AND nh.notification_date = $1::date
  )

  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM whatsapp_conversations wc_opt
    WHERE wc_opt.user_id = p.user_id AND wc_opt.opted_out = true
  )
GROUP BY p.user_id, p.phone, p.display_name

SELECT
  p.user_id, p.phone, p.display_name,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM habits h
   WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id AND h.is_active = true
  )::int AS total_active_habits,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN h.frequency_type = 'daily' OR h.frequency_type IS NULL THEN 7
      WHEN h.frequency_type = 'once' THEN
        CASE WHEN h.due_date BETWEEN ($1::date - INTERVAL '6 days') AND $1::date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
      WHEN h.days_of_week IS NOT NULL AND array_length(h.days_of_week, 1) > 0
        THEN array_length(h.days_of_week, 1)
      ELSE 7
    END
  ), 0) FROM habits h
  WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id AND h.is_active = true
  )::int AS expected_completions_this_week,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM habit_completions hc
   JOIN habits h ON h.id = hc.habit_id
   WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id
     AND hc.completed_at >= ($1::date - INTERVAL '6 days')
     AND hc.completed_at < ($1::date + INTERVAL '1 day')
  )::int AS completions_this_week,
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(h.streak), 0) FROM habits h
   WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id AND h.is_active = true
  )::int AS best_streak,
  (SELECT h.name FROM habits h
   WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id AND h.is_active = true
   
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM whatsapp_conversations wc_opt
    WHERE wc_opt.user_id = p.user_id AND wc_opt.opted_out = true
  )
ORDER BY h.streak DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
  ) AS best_streak_habit,
  (SELECT h.emoji FROM habits h
   WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id AND h.is_active = true
   ORDER BY h.streak DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
  ) AS best_streak_emoji
FROM profiles p
WHERE p.phone IS NOT NULL AND p.phone != ''
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM habits h WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id AND h.is_active = true)
  AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') = 0
  AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') = 20
  AND EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') < 5
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM notification_history nh
    WHERE nh.user_id = p.user_id
      AND nh.context_type = 'whatsapp_weekly_progress'
      AND nh.sent_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 days'
  )

SELECT p.user_id, p.phone, p.display_name, wc.last_user_message,
  EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - p.created_at)::int AS account_age_days,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM habit_completions hc WHERE hc.user_id = p.user_id)::int AS total_completions
FROM profiles p
JOIN whatsapp_conversations wc ON wc.user_id = p.user_id
WHERE p.phone IS NOT NULL AND p.phone != ''
  AND wc.last_user_message <= NOW() - INTERVAL '20 hours'
  AND wc.last_user_message > NOW() - INTERVAL '23 hours 30 minutes'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM habits h
    WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id AND h.is_active = true
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM notification_history nh
    WHERE nh.user_id = p.user_id
      AND nh.context_type = 'whatsapp_24h_nudge'
      AND nh.notification_date = $1::date
  )
  AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') BETWEEN 7 AND 22
  AND (wc.opted_out IS NOT TRUE)

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
let r = data.ai_response || '';
const m = [
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u00A7\u02DC', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F9D8)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0092\u00AA', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F4AA)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0094\u009A', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F4DA)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0092\u00A7', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F4A7)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u009A\u00AD', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F6AD)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0092\u008A', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F48A)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0097\u0093', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F5D3)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0094\u008B', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F4CB)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0092\u00A4', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F464)],
  ['\u00E2\u008F\u00B0', String.fromCodePoint(0x23F0)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0094\u0095', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F4D5)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0092\u008E', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F48E)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0094\u008C', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F4CC)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u008E\u0089', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F389)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u008F\u0086', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F3C6)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0094\u00A5', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F525)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0092\u00AB', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F4AB)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u009F\u00AD', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F9AD)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0098\u008A', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F60A)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0093\u009D', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F4DD)]
];
for (const [b, g] of m) r = r.split(b).join(g);
return { json: { ...data, ai_response: r } };

parameters.query:
WITH clean AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') AS input_phone
)
SELECT p.id as profile_id, p.user_id, p.display_name, p.phone, p.is_premium, p.has_completed_onboarding,
  (SELECT notification_preferences FROM user_progress WHERE user_id = p.user_id LIMIT 1) AS notification_preferences
FROM profiles p, clean c
WHERE
  -- Match exato
  regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = c.input_phone
  -- Sem codigo do pais no DB
  OR regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = '55' || c.input_phone
  -- Sem codigo do pais no input
  OR '55' || regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = c.input_phone
  -- Ultimos 11 digitos
  OR RIGHT(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 11) = RIGHT(c.input_phone, 11)
  -- Ultimos 10 digitos
  OR RIGHT(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 10) = RIGHT(c.input_phone, 10)
  -- NOVO: Nono digito - ultimos 8 digitos (num local) + DDD igual
  OR (
    RIGHT(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 8) = RIGHT(c.input_phone, 8)
    AND CASE
      WHEN LENGTH(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) >= 12
        THEN SUBSTRING(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 3, 2)
      WHEN LENGTH(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) >= 10
        THEN SUBSTRING(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 1, 2)
      ELSE '00'
    END = CASE
      WHEN LENGTH(c.input_phone) >= 12
        THEN SUBSTRING(c.input_phone, 3, 2)
      WHEN LENGTH(c.input_phone) >= 10
        THEN SUBSTRING(c.input_phone, 1, 2)
      ELSE '00'
    END
  )
LIMIT 1;

WITH deactivated AS (
  UPDATE habits SET is_active = false, updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE user_id = $1::uuid AND is_active = true
    AND frequency_type = 'once' AND due_date < CURRENT_DATE
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT h.id, h.name, h.emoji, h.category, h.period, h.streak, h.is_active,
  h.frequency_type, h.due_date, h.reminder_time,
  CASE WHEN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM habit_completions hc
    WHERE hc.habit_id = h.id AND hc.completed_at = CURRENT_DATE
  ) THEN true ELSE false END as completed_today
FROM habits h
WHERE h.user_id = $1::uuid AND h.is_active = true
  AND h.id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM deactivated)
ORDER BY CASE h.period
  WHEN 'morning' THEN 1 WHEN 'afternoon' THEN 2 WHEN 'evening' THEN 3 END;

INSERT INTO habit_completions (habit_id, user_id, completed_at, created_at)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date, NOW())
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
UPDATE habits
SET streak = CASE
  WHEN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM habit_completions
    WHERE habit_id = $1::uuid AND completed_at = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::date - INTERVAL '1 day'
  ) THEN streak + 1
  ELSE 1
END,
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1::uuid;
SELECT * FROM habits WHERE id = $1::uuid;

INSERT INTO habits (
  user_id, name, emoji, category, period,
  streak, is_active, days_of_week, frequency_type,
  reminder_time, due_date, created_at, updated_at, type
)
SELECT
  $1::uuid,
  $2::text,
  COALESCE(NULLIF($8, ''), ''),
  COALESCE(NULLIF($9, ''), 'productivity'),
  $3::text,
  0,
  true,
  $4::smallint[],
  $5::habit_frequency_type,
  $6::time,
  $7::date,
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  CASE WHEN $5 = 'once' THEN 'reminder' ELSE 'habit' END
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM habits
  WHERE user_id = $1::uuid
    AND LOWER(TRIM(name)) = LOWER(TRIM($2::text))
    AND is_active = true
    AND (frequency_type != 'once' OR (frequency_type = 'once' AND due_date = $7::date))
)
ON CONFLICT (user_id, LOWER(TRIM(name))) WHERE is_active = true DO NOTHING
RETURNING *;

UPDATE habits SET
  name = COALESCE(NULLIF($2, ''), name),
  period = COALESCE(NULLIF($3, ''), period),
  reminder_time = CASE WHEN $4 = '' THEN reminder_time ELSE $4::time END,
  days_of_week = CASE WHEN $5 = '{}' THEN days_of_week ELSE $5::smallint[] END,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1::uuid AND is_active = true
RETURNING *;

UPDATE habits
SET is_active = false, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1::uuid
RETURNING *;

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all();

parameters.query:
WITH matched_user AS (
  SELECT p.user_id, regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') AS profile_phone
  FROM profiles p
  WHERE regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') != ''
    AND (
      regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g') = regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
      OR RIGHT(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 11) = RIGHT(regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 11)
      OR RIGHT(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 10) = RIGHT(regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 10)
      OR (
        RIGHT(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 8) = RIGHT(regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 8)
        AND CASE
          WHEN LENGTH(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) >= 12
            THEN SUBSTRING(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 3, 2)
          WHEN LENGTH(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) >= 10
            THEN SUBSTRING(regexp_replace(p.phone, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 1, 2)
          ELSE '00'
        END = CASE
          WHEN LENGTH(regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) >= 12
            THEN SUBSTRING(regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 3, 2)
          WHEN LENGTH(regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')) >= 10
            THEN SUBSTRING(regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g'), 1, 2)
          ELSE '00'
        END
      )
    )
  LIMIT 1
),
canonical_phone AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
    (SELECT profile_phone FROM matched_user),
    regexp_replace($1, '[^0-9]', '', 'g')
  ) AS phone
),
normalize_existing AS (
  UPDATE whatsapp_conversations
  SET phone = (SELECT phone FROM canonical_phone),
      updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM matched_user)
    AND phone != (SELECT phone FROM canonical_phone)
    AND (SELECT user_id FROM matched_user) IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM whatsapp_conversations
      WHERE phone = (SELECT phone FROM canonical_phone)
    )
  RETURNING *
)
INSERT INTO public.whatsapp_conversations (phone, user_id, messages, pending_action, pending_data, awaiting_input)
VALUES (
  (SELECT phone FROM canonical_phone),
  (SELECT user_id FROM matched_user),
  '[]'::jsonb, NULL, '{}'::jsonb, NULL
)
ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET
  last_interaction = NOW(),
  user_id = COALESCE(whatsapp_conversations.user_id, (SELECT user_id FROM matched_user))
RETURNING *;

SELECT
  t.id, t.name, t.slug, t.icon_key, t.color,
  t.default_unit, t.default_goal_value, t.default_frequency_type,
  c.name as category_name, c.icon_key as category_icon
FROM public.habit_templates t
LEFT JOIN public.habit_categories c ON t.category_id = c.id
ORDER BY c.sort_order, t.name
LIMIT 20;

UPDATE public.whatsapp_conversations
SET
  messages = (
    WITH newest_20 AS (
      SELECT elem, (elem->>'timestamp')::timestamptz as ts
      FROM (
        SELECT elem, (elem->>'timestamp')::timestamptz as ts
        FROM jsonb_array_elements(COALESCE(messages, '[]'::jsonb)) elem
        WHERE elem IS NOT NULL AND elem->>'role' IS NOT NULL AND elem->>'content' IS NOT NULL
        UNION ALL
        SELECT $2::jsonb, ($2::jsonb->>'timestamp')::timestamptz
        UNION ALL
        SELECT $3::jsonb, ($3::jsonb->>'timestamp')::timestamptz
      ) all_msgs
      WHERE elem IS NOT NULL
      ORDER BY ts DESC
      LIMIT 20
    )
    SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(elem ORDER BY ts ASC), '[]'::jsonb)
    FROM newest_20
  ),
  pending_action = $4,
  pending_data = $5::jsonb,
  awaiting_input = $6,
  last_interaction = NOW(),
  last_user_message = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE phone = $1
RETURNING *;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [($('Format DB Parameters').first().json.db_phone || $('Format DB Parameters').first().json.phone), $('Format DB Parameters').first().json.user_message, $('Format DB Parameters').first().json.assistant_message, $('Format DB Parameters').first().json.pending_action, $('Format DB Parameters').first().json.pending_data, $('Format DB Parameters').first().json.awaiting_input] }}

parameters.query:
WITH habit_effective_times AS (
  SELECT
    h.id AS habit_id, h.user_id, h.name, h.emoji, h.category,
    h.period, h.streak, h.days_of_week, h.times_per_day,
    h.frequency_type, h.due_date,
    COALESCE(
      h.reminder_time,
      (SELECT hn.time FROM habit_notifications hn WHERE hn.habit_id = h.id LIMIT 1),
      CASE h.period
        WHEN 'morning' THEN '07:00'::time
        WHEN 'afternoon' THEN '13:00'::time
        WHEN 'evening' THEN '19:00'::time
      END
    ) AS effective_time,
    p.phone, p.display_name, p.is_premium, p.created_at AS user_created_at,
    h.source
  FROM habits h
  JOIN profiles p ON p.user_id = h.user_id
  WHERE h.is_active = true
    AND p.phone IS NOT NULL AND p.phone != ''
    AND (h.notification_pref IS NULL
         OR (h.notification_pref->>'reminder_enabled')::boolean IS DISTINCT FROM false)

)
SELECT het.*
FROM habit_effective_times het
WHERE (CASE WHEN het.frequency_type = 'once' THEN het.effective_time
      ELSE het.effective_time - (
    SELECT COALESCE((upo.notification_preferences->>'reminder_offset_minutes')::integer, 10)
    FROM user_progress upo WHERE upo.user_id = het.user_id LIMIT 1
  ) * INTERVAL '1 minute' END)::time >= $1::time
  AND (CASE WHEN het.frequency_type = 'once' THEN het.effective_time
      ELSE het.effective_time - (
    SELECT COALESCE((upo.notification_preferences->>'reminder_offset_minutes')::integer, 10)
    FROM user_progress upo WHERE upo.user_id = het.user_id LIMIT 1
  ) * INTERVAL '1 minute' END)::time <= $2::time
  AND (
    (het.frequency_type IS DISTINCT FROM 'once'
     AND (het.days_of_week IS NULL OR array_length(het.days_of_week,1) IS NULL
          OR $3::int = ANY(het.days_of_week)))
    OR
    (het.frequency_type = 'once' AND het.due_date = $4::date)
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM habit_completions hc
    WHERE hc.habit_id = het.habit_id AND hc.completed_at = $4::date
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM notification_history nh
    WHERE nh.habit_id = het.habit_id AND nh.user_id = het.user_id
      AND nh.notification_date = $4::date AND nh.context_type LIKE 'whatsapp_%'
  )


  -- Per-user cooldown: skip se usuario recebeu lembrete WhatsApp nos ultimos 60 min
  -- Previne spam quando habitos tem horarios proximos mas em janelas diferentes


  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM whatsapp_conversations wc_opt
    WHERE wc_opt.user_id = het.user_id AND wc_opt.opted_out = true
  )
ORDER BY het.user_id;

SELECT p.user_id, p.phone, p.display_name,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification_history nh
   WHERE nh.user_id = p.user_id AND nh.context_type = 'whatsapp_reengagement'
  )::int + 1 AS reengagement_tier
FROM profiles p
WHERE p.phone IS NOT NULL AND p.phone != ''
  AND p.created_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM habits h WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id AND h.is_active = true)
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM habit_completions hc
    WHERE hc.user_id = p.user_id
      AND hc.completed_at >= ($1::date - INTERVAL '7 days')
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM user_progress up
    WHERE up.user_id = p.user_id
      AND up.last_activity_date >= ($1::date - INTERVAL '7 days')
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM notification_history nh
    WHERE nh.user_id = p.user_id
      AND nh.context_type = 'whatsapp_reengagement'
      AND nh.sent_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  )
  AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification_history nh
       WHERE nh.user_id = p.user_id AND nh.context_type = 'whatsapp_reengagement'
  ) < 3
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM whatsapp_conversations wc_opt
    WHERE wc_opt.user_id = p.user_id AND wc_opt.opted_out = true
  )

SELECT
  p.user_id, p.phone, p.display_name,
  json_agg(json_build_object(
    'name', h.name, 'emoji', h.emoji, 'period', h.period,
    'reminder_time', COALESCE(h.reminder_time,
      CASE h.period WHEN 'morning' THEN '07:00'::time WHEN 'afternoon' THEN '13:00'::time ELSE '19:00'::time END)
  ) ORDER BY COALESCE(h.reminder_time,
      CASE h.period WHEN 'morning' THEN '07:00'::time WHEN 'afternoon' THEN '13:00'::time ELSE '19:00'::time END)) AS habits_today,
  COUNT(h.id)::int AS habit_count
FROM profiles p
JOIN habits h ON h.user_id = p.user_id
WHERE p.phone IS NOT NULL AND p.phone != ''
  AND h.is_active = true
  AND (
    h.frequency_type = 'daily'
    OR (h.frequency_type NOT IN ('daily', 'once')
        AND h.days_of_week @> ARRAY[EXTRACT(DOW FROM (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'))::smallint])
    OR (h.frequency_type = 'once' AND h.due_date = $1::date)
  )
  AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') = 7
  AND EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') < 5
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM notification_history nh
    WHERE nh.user_id = p.user_id
      AND nh.context_type = 'whatsapp_morning_summary'
      AND nh.notification_date = $1::date
  )

  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM whatsapp_conversations wc_opt
    WHERE wc_opt.user_id = p.user_id AND wc_opt.opted_out = true
  )
GROUP BY p.user_id, p.phone, p.display_name

SELECT
  p.user_id, p.phone, p.display_name,
  json_agg(json_build_object(
    'name', h.name, 'emoji', h.emoji,
    'completed', (hc.id IS NOT NULL)
  ) ORDER BY COALESCE(h.reminder_time, '09:00'::time)) AS habits_today,
  COUNT(h.id)::int AS total_habits,
  COUNT(hc.id)::int AS completed_count
FROM profiles p
JOIN habits h ON h.user_id = p.user_id
LEFT JOIN habit_completions hc
  ON hc.habit_id = h.id AND hc.completed_at::date = $1::date
WHERE p.phone IS NOT NULL AND p.phone != ''
  AND h.is_active = true
  AND (
    h.frequency_type = 'daily'
    OR (h.frequency_type NOT IN ('daily', 'once')
        AND h.days_of_week @> ARRAY[EXTRACT(DOW FROM (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'))::smallint])
    OR (h.frequency_type = 'once' AND h.due_date = $1::date)
  )
  AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') = 21
  AND EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') < 5
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM notification_history nh
    WHERE nh.user_id = p.user_id
      AND nh.context_type = 'whatsapp_evening_recap'
      AND nh.notification_date = $1::date
  )

  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM whatsapp_conversations wc_opt
    WHERE wc_opt.user_id = p.user_id AND wc_opt.opted_out = true
  )
GROUP BY p.user_id, p.phone, p.display_name

SELECT
  p.user_id, p.phone, p.display_name,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM habits h
   WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id AND h.is_active = true
  )::int AS total_active_habits,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN h.frequency_type = 'daily' OR h.frequency_type IS NULL THEN 7
      WHEN h.frequency_type = 'once' THEN
        CASE WHEN h.due_date BETWEEN ($1::date - INTERVAL '6 days') AND $1::date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
      WHEN h.days_of_week IS NOT NULL AND array_length(h.days_of_week, 1) > 0
        THEN array_length(h.days_of_week, 1)
      ELSE 7
    END
  ), 0) FROM habits h
  WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id AND h.is_active = true
  )::int AS expected_completions_this_week,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM habit_completions hc
   JOIN habits h ON h.id = hc.habit_id
   WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id
     AND hc.completed_at >= ($1::date - INTERVAL '6 days')
     AND hc.completed_at < ($1::date + INTERVAL '1 day')
  )::int AS completions_this_week,
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(h.streak), 0) FROM habits h
   WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id AND h.is_active = true
  )::int AS best_streak,
  (SELECT h.name FROM habits h
   WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id AND h.is_active = true
   
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM whatsapp_conversations wc_opt
    WHERE wc_opt.user_id = p.user_id AND wc_opt.opted_out = true
  )
ORDER BY h.streak DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
  ) AS best_streak_habit,
  (SELECT h.emoji FROM habits h
   WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id AND h.is_active = true
   ORDER BY h.streak DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
  ) AS best_streak_emoji
FROM profiles p
WHERE p.phone IS NOT NULL AND p.phone != ''
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM habits h WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id AND h.is_active = true)
  AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') = 0
  AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') = 20
  AND EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') < 5
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM notification_history nh
    WHERE nh.user_id = p.user_id
      AND nh.context_type = 'whatsapp_weekly_progress'
      AND nh.sent_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 days'
  )

SELECT p.user_id, p.phone, p.display_name, wc.last_user_message,
  EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - p.created_at)::int AS account_age_days,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM habit_completions hc WHERE hc.user_id = p.user_id)::int AS total_completions
FROM profiles p
JOIN whatsapp_conversations wc ON wc.user_id = p.user_id
WHERE p.phone IS NOT NULL AND p.phone != ''
  AND wc.last_user_message <= NOW() - INTERVAL '20 hours'
  AND wc.last_user_message > NOW() - INTERVAL '23 hours 30 minutes'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM habits h
    WHERE h.user_id = p.user_id AND h.is_active = true
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM notification_history nh
    WHERE nh.user_id = p.user_id
      AND nh.context_type = 'whatsapp_24h_nudge'
      AND nh.notification_date = $1::date
  )
  AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo') BETWEEN 7 AND 22
  AND (wc.opted_out IS NOT TRUE)

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
let r = data.ai_response || '';
const m = [
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u00A7\u02DC', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F9D8)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0092\u00AA', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F4AA)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0094\u009A', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F4DA)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0092\u00A7', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F4A7)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u009A\u00AD', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F6AD)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0092\u008A', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F48A)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0097\u0093', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F5D3)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0094\u008B', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F4CB)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0092\u00A4', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F464)],
  ['\u00E2\u008F\u00B0', String.fromCodePoint(0x23F0)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0094\u0095', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F4D5)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0092\u008E', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F48E)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0094\u008C', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F4CC)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u008E\u0089', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F389)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u008F\u0086', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F3C6)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0094\u00A5', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F525)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0092\u00AB', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F4AB)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u009F\u00AD', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F9AD)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0098\u008A', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F60A)],
  ['\u00F0\u0178\u0093\u009D', String.fromCodePoint(0x1F4DD)]
];
for (const [b, g] of m) r = r.split(b).join(g);
return { json: { ...data, ai_response: r } };
